name: Acheron but you pissed her off
description:

Based off of ; [Rondo Across Countless Kalpas - HSR animated](https://youtu.be/e5xueJq4Lwc?si=ASAPiUX46xdB2YtS). You take Black Swan's POV this time. (You're a Memokeeper obviously, you're just not locked to playing Black Swan.)
